n: The Ale Association -- A Game of Hobbit-harrying

steps.t: Scared hobbits are all over the Haunted Burrow, and surely there is a way to frighten them, because it is funny. You should harry and harass the hobbi…
Ráthgeir, a mean sort of dwarf, can be found outside the Haunted Burrow, hiding behind some crates. You should tell Ráthgeir all about the little pran…
